response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no demonstrated professional C++ experience on Windows (only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments ~6 months in 2014-2015), no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The candidate's expertise centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/product domains, which does not align with the C++/Windows/finance profile required.
strengths: Extensive software engineering career (~15+ years) with strong fundamentals and TDD/craftsmanship practices
Excellent written and verbal communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
concerns: No 5-10 years of professional C++ on Windows — only ~6 months of C/C++ work over a decade ago
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background
Career trajectory is firmly in web/product/AI tooling (TypeScript, Node, DLang), not low-level finance systems
